task:
Remove the dead `basePlaybooksDir()` export from packages/personas/src/index.ts (it is the function at lines 12-14:

  export function basePlaybooksDir(): string {
    return join(dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)), '..', 'base', 'playbooks')
  }

This export is dead: the directory it points to, packages/personas/base/playbooks/, has been deleted, and a repo-wide grep shows ZERO callers other than the definition itself. Founder has DECIDED to remove it (Doc Truth Analysis run_267 follow-up #1).

WHAT TO CHANGE: Delete only that one exported function (and any now-unused import it solely required — but note `dirname`, `fileURLToPath`, and `join` are still used by `basePersonasDir()` and `basePlaysDir()`, so the imports must stay). Touch nothing else in the file.

WHAT MUST NOT BREAK: `basePersonasDir()` and `basePlaysDir()` remain intact and unchanged.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (run these and include output as evidence):
1. `grep -rn basePlaybooksDir packages/ apps/ scripts/` returns NOTHING (zero matches anywhere).
2. `pnpm typecheck` passes (or, if too slow, at minimum `pnpm --filter @cocoder/personas... typecheck` / the personas package builds clean).
3. `git diff` shows ONLY the removal of those 3 lines (plus possibly one blank line) in packages/personas/src/index.ts — no other files touched.

Do not run git commit; the runner commits after verification.

Remove the dead v1 Playbook P1–P6 pipeline from packages/core/src/playbooks/. Founder DECIDED this cleanup (Doc Truth Analysis run_267 follow-up #2): these modules were orphaned when ADR-0026 deleted the daemon executor branch that called them. Oscar has already enumerated the live caller graph (do not re-trust line numbers; the KEEP/DELETE boundary below is derived from a full import-graph trace and is authoritative for what survives, but YOU must prove completeness via the exit criteria).

KEEP (do NOT delete or alter behavior):
- packages/core/src/playbooks/recon.ts  (provides `inventoryRepo`, the ONLY live production symbol — imported by packages/core/src/drift/read-reality.ts and scripts/proof-drift-audit.mjs). recon.ts imports zero siblings, so it stands alone.
- packages/core/tests/playbook-recon.test.ts  (tests inventoryRepo only).
- packages/core/src/playbooks/index.ts  — KEEP THE FILE but TRIM it: it must re-export ONLY the symbols that come from recon.ts (inventoryRepo plus recon.ts's exported types: ExtensionCount, LocGroup, PackageInventory, RepoInventory, RiskHint, RiskHintKind, RootInventory, RootValidationInventory, ScriptCategory, ScriptInventory, WorkspaceInventory). Delete every other `export { ... } from './<module>.js'` block in this barrel.

DELETE (these 23 modules — all have zero production callers; only the dead barrel re-export + their own tests reference them; they form a closed self-referential subgraph that does not touch recon.ts's live path):
  recon-pass.ts, estimate.ts, intent.ts, intent-artifacts.ts, p1-action.ts, p2-action.ts, p2-dispatch.ts, p2-fanout.ts, p3-action.ts, p3-cross-check.ts, p3-input.ts, p3-render.ts, p4-action.ts, p4-input.ts, p4-questions.ts, p4-render.ts, p5-action.ts, p5-input.ts, p5-render.ts, p5-synthesis.ts, p6-apply.ts, p6-input.ts, p6-render.ts

ALSO DELETE every test file under packages/core/tests/ whose subject is one of the deleted modules (e.g. playbook-intent.test.ts, playbook-intent-artifacts.test.ts, playbook-recon-pass.test.ts, playbook-estimate.test.ts, playbook-p2-dispatch.test.ts, playbook-p2-action.test.ts, playbook-p2-fanout.test.ts, playbook-p3-action.test.ts, playbook-p4-questions.test.ts, playbook-p5-synthesis.test.ts, playbook-p6-apply.test.ts — and ANY other tests that import a deleted symbol). Do NOT trust this list as complete: after deleting, grep the tests dir for imports of deleted modules and remove all of them. Keep playbook-recon.test.ts.

ALSO: check packages/core/src/index.ts — it re-exports from './playbooks/index.js' (around line 256). If it names individual deleted symbols in an explicit export list, trim those names so it only re-exports surviving (recon) symbols. If it does a blanket `export * `/`export { ... } from './playbooks/index.js'` that now only carries recon symbols, leave it. The typecheck is the arbiter.

WHAT MUST NOT BREAK: `inventoryRepo` and its types remain exported from @cocoder/core; packages/core/src/drift/read-reality.ts and scripts/proof-drift-audit.mjs still typecheck and their behavior is untouched.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (run all; include output as evidence):
1. `pnpm typecheck` passes clean across all workspace projects (this is the primary proof that no surviving file imports a deleted module).
2. `pnpm --filter @cocoder/core test` passes green (proves no test imports a deleted module and the recon test still passes).
3. `grep -rIn "runPlaybookP1Action\|runPlaybookP2Action\|runPlaybookP3Action\|runPlaybookP4Action\|runPlaybookP5Action\|runPlaybookP6Action\|buildEstimate\|runIntentIntake\|runDeepReadSource\|runAgenticRecon\|synthesizeP5Governance\|buildFounderQuestions" packages apps scripts` returns ZERO matches.
4. `grep -rIn "inventoryRepo" packages` STILL shows it exported from recon.ts/index.ts and used by drift/read-reality.ts (proves the live path survived).
5. `git status` shows ONLY deletions under packages/core/src/playbooks/ + packages/core/tests/, plus the trimmed index.ts edit(s). No unrelated files.

Do not run git commit; the runner commits after verification.
